systemInstructions: Generate an AI Agent App focused on article planning, drafting, rewriting, and editorial review.
Use only text-capable provider requirements through the Sofvary AI Gateway.
fileSystemRules: Write provider requirement metadata only inside generated/ai.
Write React UI files only inside generated/react.
Do not store drafts outside the active workspace unless a future user-approved export flow exists.
outputRules: Show provider binding status without displaying API keys or secure refs.
Send article generation requests only to the local Sofvary AI Gateway.
Keep generated artifacts workspace-local and export-clean.
